rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK VS. XELAN PROP 1, LLC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Receiver To Sell Real Property Asset Of Receivership Estate; And Confirming Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 03, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF UMPQUA BANK's Motion For Order Instructing Receiver To Sell Real Property Asset Of Receivership Estate; And Confirming Sale Of Real Property Hearing Required. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts regarding refinancing procedure. Parties to have their respective proposed agreements, contracts, orders ready to be executed and presented to the Court for consideration. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE MEDINA ET AL VS. SYLVIA RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 03, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ALVAREZ's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DOMINIC YAM VS. GLORIA YAM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 03, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANTs GLORIA YAM and CHARLES KIM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to April 19, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than April 4, 2019 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KALPESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. TONY LAMARR BLU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 03, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT PETER NORRIS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRENT MARSH VS. MICHAEL CAMPESINO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 03, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts explaining the change in allegations, i.e. purportedly ineffective rescission and 5 Day Notice. (Sham pleading doctrine). Plaintiff shall also allege facts supporting Plaintiff's assertion that Defendant's sub tenancy may be terminated based on breaches of the Master Lease, e.g. defendant is a party or is bound by the master lease; defendant's sub-tenancy may be lawfully terminated based on master tenant's breaches of the master lease, etc. All allegations must be made in clear and concise language. All amendments to be in bold font. The Court does not find, based on the operative complaint, that service of the 5 Day Notice served as implied withdrawal of the 3 Day Notice. This argument may be raised, if necessary and proper, at a later time in these proceedings. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALVIN HINES VS. KAREN TAYLOR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 03, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT KAREN TAYLOR's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. = (501/CFH)
